'''鈭歾-s-r''' ('''kazasar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:york|york]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:york|york]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| kazasar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizasar|thizasar]] || [[word:jizasar|jizasar]] || [[word:shizasar|shizasar]] || [[word:kizasar|kizasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzasar|thuthuzasar]] || [[word:jujuzasar|jujuzasar]] || [[word:shushuzasar|shushuzasar]] || [[word:kukuzasar|kukuzasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzasar|thuzasar]] || [[word:juzasar|juzasar]] || [[word:shuzasar|shuzasar]] || [[word:kuzasar|kuzasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzasar|thuzasar]] || [[word:juzasar|juzasar]] || [[word:shuzasar|shuzasar]] || [[word:kuzasar|kuzasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezasar|thezasar]] || [[word:jezasar|jezasar]] || [[word:shezasar|shezasar]] || [[word:kezasar|kezasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozasar|thothozasar]] || [[word:jojozasar|jojozasar]] || [[word:shoshozasar|shoshozasar]] || [[word:kokozasar|kokozasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozasar|thozasar]] || [[word:jozasar|jozasar]] || [[word:shozasar|shozasar]] || [[word:kozasar|kozasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozasar|thozasar]] || [[word:jozasar|jozasar]] || [[word:shozasar|shozasar]] || [[word:kozasar|kozasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zasar|th忙zasar]] || [[word:j忙zasar|j忙zasar]] || [[word:sh忙zasar|sh忙zasar]] || [[word:k忙zasar|k忙zasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazasar|thathazasar]] || [[word:jajazasar|jajazasar]] || [[word:shashazasar|shashazasar]] || [[word:kakazasar|kakazasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazasar|thazasar]] || [[word:jazasar|jazasar]] || [[word:shazasar|shazasar]] || [[word:kazasar|kazasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazasar|thazasar]] || [[word:jazasar|jazasar]] || [[word:shazasar|shazasar]] || [[word:kazasar|kazasar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazasar|shazasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazasar|goshazasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazasar|gokishazasar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazasarn眉|shazasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazasarnkn眉|goshazasarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasarn眉|gokishazasarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazasarsh毛|shazasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazasarnksh毛|goshazasarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazasarsh毛|gokishazasarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasaro|shazasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasarnkro|goshazasarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasaro|gokishazasaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasarmu|shazasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasarnkmu|goshazasarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasarmu|gokishazasarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazasarsher|shazasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazasarnksher|goshazasarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazasarsher|gokishazasarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazasarng|shazasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazasarnkng|goshazasarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazasarng|gokishazasarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazasarya|shazasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazasarnkya|goshazasarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazasarya|gokishazasarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazasaryam|shazasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazasarnkyam|goshazasarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazasaryam|gokishazasaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasarn眉sh毛|shazasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasarnkn眉sh毛|goshazasarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasarn眉sh毛|gokishazasarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasarn眉ro|shazasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasarnkn眉ro|goshazasarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasarn眉ro|gokishazasarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasarn眉mu|shazasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasarnkn眉mu|goshazasarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasarn眉mu|gokishazasarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasarsh毛n眉|shazasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasarnksh毛n眉|goshazasarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasarsh毛n眉|gokishazasarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasarsh毛ro|shazasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasarnksh毛ro|goshazasarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasarsh毛ro|gokishazasarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasarsh毛mu|shazasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasarnksh毛mu|goshazasarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasarsh毛mu|gokishazasarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasaron眉|shazasaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasarnkron眉|goshazasarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasaron眉|gokishazasaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasarosh毛|shazasarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasarnkrosh毛|goshazasarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasarosh毛|gokishazasarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazasaromu|shazasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazasarnkromu|goshazasarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazasaromu|gokishazasaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazasarmun眉|shazasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazasarnkmun眉|goshazasarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazasarmun眉|gokishazasarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazasarmush毛|shazasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazasarnkmush毛|goshazasarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazasarmush毛|gokishazasarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazasarmuro|shazasarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazasarnkmuro|goshazasarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazasarmuro|gokishazasarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
